nodes.label: AI as drafting assistant for emails
nodes.grounding_span: AI is not used very often in my workday, the most it would be used is in emails when writing emails when AI will suggest what to write or to add events to my calendar

nodes.label: Human judgment over AI suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: Normally just the wrong words for the context of the email or situation

nodes.label: AI as tool requiring human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I want to write it myself and make sure I send it so I can review it first

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate in partnership with it, I do not let it do anything by itself without me at least reviewing it

nodes.label: Maintaining skills despite AI takeover
nodes.label_negative: AI takeover in critical human-required tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think there will ever be a full AI takeover in the important areas in my work as there always needs to be a human component

nodes.label: Efficiency and speed in communication
nodes.grounding_span: I can finish my emails quicker without writing full words

nodes.label: Accuracy and contextual appropriateness
nodes.grounding_span: Normally just the wrong words for the context of the email or situation

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I would want to maintain my skills in all areas to allow myself to be able to work with or without AI

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as reference tool
nodes.grounding_span: I feel satisfied when AI can succesfully predict what I am typing so I can finish my emails quicker

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's inability to maintain context
nodes.grounding_span: Normally just the wrong words for the context of the email or situation

nodes.label: Preference for human review and control
nodes.grounding_span: I want to write it myself and make sure I send it so I can review it first

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I can see AI still being used in communications at work and maybe being used for tasks that do not need human intervention

nodes.label: Evaluative and selective acceptance of AI suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: Half and half, when I'm writing and AI suggests the next word, sometimes it is correct and sometimes it is not so it depends

nodes.label: Collaborative oversight — working alongside AI with review
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate in partnership with it, I do not let it do anything by itself without me at least reviewing it before being sent off
